title: Targa's (TRGP) Q1 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Targa (TRGP) expects an adjusted EBITDA of $3.5-$3.7 billion, growth capital expenditures of $2-$2.2 billion and net maintenance capital spending of $175 million for 2023.

title: The 3 Best Stocks to Buy With $500 Right Now
text: Thanks to the advent of fractional share investing, you can take $500 and create a portfolio of numerous stocks. That's part of the democratization of investing.

title: 4 Refining & Marketing MLP Stocks That Should be on Investors' Radar
text: The fundamental picture for the Zacks Oil and Gas - Refining & Marketing MLP industry continues to show signs of tightening. This bodes well for firms like TRGP, SUN, CLMT and NGL.
